data.description:
Repro (verified): CLI rebar list --include-archived --exclude-deleted works (statuses drop deleted); rebar.list_tickets and MCP list_tickets have no exclude_deleted parameter (inspect.signature confirmed) — _reads.list_tickets hardcodes exclude_deleted=False (src/rebar/_reads.py:94-96).

Source: _reads.py:94-96; __init__.py:300-322; mcp_server.py:145-167; CLI flag at _engine/rebar:89. The tests/interfaces parity suite does not cover this flag (coverage gap to close with the fix).

Fix: thread exclude_deleted through library + MCP; add the parity case. RED test: same store, deleted ticket, all three interfaces with exclude_deleted -> identical results.
data.title: list: --exclude-deleted exists on CLI only; library and MCP cannot exclude deleted tickets
